caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt sits in front of a professional microphone in a room filled with clothing and framed pictures. His shirt features the white text "I DON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". To his left, several framed photos hang on a wall, and behind him, a white mannequin wears a white shirt while racks of colorful clothing are visible. A logo featuring a red and black circle with white text is positioned in the bottom left, and red text that reads "HELLY" is visible on the right. As the scene progresses, the man shifts his gaze from a neutral forward position to looking slightly to his right, while his facial expression remains relatively still. The background elements and equipment remain stationary throughout the clip.
